summary: Crystal‑clear audience recording of a legendary second set featuring an epic Iko Iko → The Other One transition, stellar Space → Sugar Magnolia segment and a gorgeous Sugaree.
review: Reviewers rave about the immaculate AUD capture—close, clean and almost board‑level in fidelity—with even a matrix version praised. Musically the second set shines, highlighted by an emotional Iko Iko → The Other One segue, one of the best post‑drums Space → Sugar Magnolia stretches since ’74, and a standout Sugaree, making this show one of the Dead’s all‑time greats.

ai_rating.rationale: All three reviews give five stars, praising both performance and sound; recording is described as near‑board quality and the show is called one of the best ever.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Very clean, close mic placement, high off‑the‑crowd position; feels about two‑thirds board quality. Reviewer also notes a superb matrix version.

show_quality.setlist_flow: Second set flows flawlessly with emotional transitions (Iko Iko into The Other One) and a powerful post‑drums sequence (Space into Sugar Magnolia), delivering an almost seamless listening experience.

band_member_comments.Jerry: Uses his time wisely during the drum break; guitar work praised throughout the set.
band_member_comments.Drums: Post‑drums segment (Space → Sugar Magnolia) hailed as one of the best after ’74.
